'''Doellin''' was the Mother Goddess of the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]]. She was depicted as having three [[Breast/Legends|breasts]] and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], like all [[Gender/Legends|female]] Gran.<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> Her name figured in an insult used by the Gran, "Doellin-forsaken."<ref name="HoloNet">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|regional/13411_1.html|Moe Funeral Disrupted by Dug Activists}}</ref>

{{Deity-stub}}
